author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit 3fcff7a. engine::LineProcessor (shares per-line logic with apply() via extracted dispatch_op; carries RangeFilter/budget/line-counter state across calls; rejects multiline at construction). pipe_mode streaming: per-line terminator passthrough (mixed CRLF/LF byte-exact — strictly better than buffered majority vote), inserted lines take current line's terminator, count-at-EOF, EPIPE = quiet success. main.rs: --pipe and --no-json stream unless -U; autodetect peeks the buffered first chunk without consuming — '{'-prefixed input buffers for JSON detection exactly as before, everything else streams; empty-stdin file-mode fallback preserved. Spec note: the 64MiB stdin cap from the 0.2.5 changelog turned out to no longer exist in the code, so nothing needed removing. The #91-coordination concern resolved cleanly: multiline ops fall back to the buffered path. 18 new tests incl. real-EPIPE child-process e2e and a 4MB stream. 23 suites green, clippy/fmt clean.
